use_cases: Landing page hero section with animated wave backgrounds
Decorative animated section dividers between content blocks
Visual loading states with generative wave motion
Brand backgrounds for creative agency websites
Dynamic ambient visual elements for immersive experiences
ai_summary: A canvas-based generative animation component that renders organic mechanical waves using simplex noise algorithms. Supports customizable dimensions, dual-color theming (background and foreground), and adjustable motion parameters including speed, amplitude, and peak height. Creates flowing, noise-driven wave patterns ideal for ambient backgrounds and decorative visual elements.
